name: AI Drone Simulator
short_description: AI Drone Simulator is an FPV drone simulator. Huge, dynamic environments. Virtual copy of your own drone. Total customization for maximum pilot power. Community sharing of drones, maps and tracks !
detailed_description:
Hardcore, realistic FPV drone sim. Huge, dynamic environments. Virtual copy of your own drone. Total customization for maximum pilot power. Community sharing of drones, maps and tracks !

For more than 2 years, AI Drone has been helping you to achieve your goals with an FPV simulator that's more realistic than ever, and that's always ready to listen to its community. Embark on a journey of progression, where every flight is another step further !

  • Dynamic Environments
    Explore over 18 maps filled with dynamic content like cars, trains, planes, and animals. Share or download tracks & maps from the community for endless improvement and variety, without ever feeling bored.


  • Blackbox import : realism at your fingertips
    Bring your drone to life by importing the blackbox file. Combined with AI Drone's physics, enjoy a faithful reproduction of your drone for an experience as close to reality as possible. Plus, explore hundreds of community drones, all available for download to enrich your experience.

  • From Beginner to expert level
    For perfectionists, delve into advanced precision settings to find the perfect balance. Novices, fear not! The default settings are carefully selected to ensure optimum realism with any drone.


  • Your Spots in the Simulator
    Recreate your dream spots with the powerful in-game Editor, and continually evolve through your own spots or those shared by friends. Download maps and tracks from the community for endless variety. The in-game editor allows the use of hundreds of objects and the import of your own PNGs and 3D models for complete personalization.


  • The Most Customizable FPV Sim
    Enjoy total creative freedom by importing your own Unreal Engine maps into the sim!

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese
